message:
test(fcp-core): expand provisioning, connector, and credential tests

provisioning: +59 tests (67→126) covering RecipeId/StepId edge cases,
OAuthRecipe variants, MockProvisioner flows, ProvisioningState lifecycle.
connector: +26 tests (34→60) covering ConnectorMetrics serde/clone,
BaseConnector state transitions, high-volume operations, identity.
credential: +38 tests (53→91) covering CredentialId serde transparency,
CredentialApplication variants, host matching, IP literal detection,
is_usable conditions, CredentialValidationError Display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
